message:
feat(python): masked_less / masked_greater wrappers (franken_numpy-ak7y franken_numpy-qxwb)

Add fnp_python.masked_less(x, value, copy=True) and
fnp_python.masked_greater(x, value, copy=True) as passthrough
delegators to np.ma.{masked_less,masked_greater} preserving the
strict comparison masking semantics, copy-flag forwarding, and
MaskedArray return-type contracts across integer / float / 2-D
inputs.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test (masked_less) with seven scenarios
exercising the threshold space: int64 with int threshold, float64
with float threshold, threshold below all values (no mask),
threshold above all values (full mask), 2-D input, mixed-sign data
with negative threshold, copy=False forwarded. The matching
masked_greater test landed alongside the wrapper in this commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
